note: REL-5 persisted reconciler fuzz corpus. run-fuzz-corpus.js replays `run-stress.js --seed N --quick` for each seed, so these exact randomized mutation sequences are a DETERMINISTIC per-commit regression set (run-stress's own base seed is time-derived for discovery; this pins a fixed floor). When a discovery run finds a failing seed, ADD it here so it can never regress.
